creator: trost@cloud.rain.com
text:
sysinstall was unable to find the ftp host specified to provide
	the upgrade source

Fix: 

The workaround is obvious -- modify host.conf. Maybe
	sysinstall should do that itself.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Find a machine running FreeBSD.
	echo hosts > /etc/host.conf
	Upgrade said machine.
